overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist exploring a historic Middle Eastern city. The character walks through bustling market streets, courtyards, and narrow alleys, engaging in brief combat with enemies. The environment features mud-brick architecture, textile stalls, and crowded pedestrian areas under bright desert sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with textile stalls

events.description: character enters narrow stone archway passage from open market area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market street, passing textile vendors and entering a stone archway

notable_agents.action: vendor in green robe arranging carpets at the textile stall

entered.detail: wooden stall displaying rolled carpets and fabrics under a fabric awning
large stone archway entrance leading to inner courtyard
cluster of terracotta pottery vessels displayed on the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered market street with textile stalls displaying colorful carpets. The hooded protagonist walks past a vendor in green robes arranging fabrics, moving toward a large mud-brick archway. At around 8 seconds, the character enters the narrow stone passage, transitioning from the open market into the enclosed walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with stone stairs and palm trees

events.description: exits narrow passage into sunlit open courtyard with stairs
character ascends stone stairs to upper courtyard level

agents.ego_description: exploring the courtyard, walking up stone stairs and surveying the area from the upper level

entered.detail: open cobblestone courtyard surrounded by two-story mud-brick buildings
wide stone staircase leading to upper terrace level
tall palm tree providing shade in the courtyard center
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage into a bright sunlit courtyard surrounded by mud-brick buildings. The space opens up significantly with full sky visibility. The protagonist ascends a wide stone staircase to an upper terrace, passing a wooden hay cart and a central palm tree, exploring the elevated area before descending back to the main level.

events.description: character engages and performs stealth takedown on highlighted enemy

agents.ego_description: engaging an enemy in close combat, executing a stealth takedown maneuver

notable_agents.action: enemy guard being taken down by the protagonist

entered.detail: wooden stall displaying clay pots and ceramic vessels

segments.scene_description: In this brief segment, the character encounters an enemy in the street and engages in combat. The protagonist performs a stealth takedown on the highlighted guard near a pottery stall, then continues moving through the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow historic street with shops and stairs

events.description: mounted NPC on horse passes by in the street
character begins ascending long flight of stone stairs

agents.ego_description: navigating through crowded streets, passing mounted NPCs and climbing stone stairs

notable_agents.action: mounted guard on horseback riding through the street

entered.detail: building with distinctive green painted wooden doors and archway
long flight of worn stone steps leading upward through the street
row of tall narrow cypress trees lining the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower historic street lined with shops, passing a building with distinctive green doors. A mounted NPC on horseback rides past in the opposite direction. The protagonist then begins ascending a long flight of stone stairs, with tall cypress trees visible ahead marking the path forward through the dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with butcher shop and cypress trees

events.description: passing by open-air butcher shop with hanging meat displays

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alleyways, passing the butcher shop and approaching a large archway

entered.detail: open shop front with hooks displaying hanging meat and animal carcasses
ornate stone archway marking the entrance to another district
large mound of pink flowers displayed outside a shop

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes the character through a narrow alley lined with tall cypress trees. The protagonist passes an open-air butcher shop with meat hanging from hooks on the left, and a pile of pink flowers on the right. The ground transitions to dirt as the character approaches a large ornate stone archway in the distance, marking the transition to another area of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a vibrant covered market through a series of sunlit courtyards and narrow urban corridors. It begins amidst colorful textile stalls and a vendor in green robes, moving through a mud-brick archway into a narrow stone passage. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a bright courtyard where the protagonist ascends a stone staircase past a palm tree before descending to engage a guard in a stealth takedown near a pottery stall. The movement then shifts back into the dense city streets, passing green doors and a mounted rider before climbing another long flight of stairs toward towering cypress trees. Finally, the path narrows into an alley lined with a butcher shop and pink flowers, with the ground transitioning to dirt as the camera approaches a large ornate stone archway.
